_basis: GCAT/BCAT cost-of-transitions model: C_g << C_e + C_f

economic_model.roi_narrative: Prevent a small fraction of bad actions → Save millions

audit.label: Trust & Risk Audit
audit.description: Expose silent failure modes before they compound
audit.economic_basis: Fixed engagement. Value = prevented incidents × average incident cost.

items.name: AI & Governance Risk Audit
items.roi_note: Single prevented incident ($50K–$200K) covers engagement cost 3–15×

items.name: Full Trust & Risk Audit
items.roi_note: Prevents cascade failures. One stopped cascade ($500K–$2M) covers cost 15–100×

items.name: Continuous Trust Oversight
items.roi_note: Annual incident avoidance target: $2M–$10M. Cost ratio: 1:30 to 1:150

sdk.label: StegVerse SDK
sdk.description: GCAT/BCAT execution-layer primitives. Embed governance into your systems.
sdk.economic_basis: Per-seat or per-evaluation. Value = C_g << C_e + C_f on every transition.

items.name: Community
items.roi_note: Free entry. Cost = your compute time. Value = learn the pattern before production.

items.name: Pro
items.roi_note: At 1,000 evals/month: $0.10–$0.20 per evaluation. One prevented bad deploy saves $10K–$100K.

items.name: Enterprise
items.roi_note: Custom pricing based on evaluation volume + prevented incident value. Typical: 1:500 to 1:5000 cost-to-value ratio.

platform.label: StegVerse Platform
platform.description: Managed execution infrastructure. We run the governance layer; you run the business.
platform.economic_basis: Per-evaluation or flat rate. Value = zero infrastructure + zero governance ops + maximum safety.

items.name: Starter
items.roi_note: $0.01 per evaluation. One prevented data corruption incident ($50K) covers 3+ years of platform cost.

items.name: Growth
items.roi_note: $0.005–$0.008 per evaluation. Prevents cascade failures at scale. One stopped cascade ($500K) covers 1+ year.

items.name: Scale
items.roi_note: Custom pricing based on evaluation volume + compliance value + incident avoidance. Typical enterprise saves $2M–$20M annually vs ungoverned execution.

notes: All pricing grounded in GCAT/BCAT cost model: governance cost C_g is ~10^7× cheaper than execution cost C_e + failure cost C_f.
Break-even: r * p_bad * (C_e + C_f) > C_g. Since C_g is tiny, threshold is extremely low.
Academic and nonprofit discounts: 50% off Pro/Platform. Contact for Enterprise custom terms.
Annual billing: 2 months free on all paid tiers.
